description.en: The 「Sprite of the Plateau」, known for its incredible speed and fine wool.
description.zh: 被誉为「高原精灵」，以极快的奔跑速度和细腻的羊绒闻名。

anatomy.en: Males have long, elegant black horns that curve slightly. They have very thick underfur to survive temperatures of -40 degrees Celsius.
anatomy.zh: 雄性长着长而优雅的黑色角，微微弯曲。它们拥有极厚的绒毛，能在零下 40 摄氏度的环境中生存。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are famous for their long-distance migrations to give birth. They are very shy and can run up to 80 kilometers per hour.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们因长途迁徙产仔而闻名。它们非常胆小，奔跑时速可达 80 公里。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the high Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, living in alpine steppes and cold deserts.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 中国青藏高原特有种，生活在高山草原和高寒荒漠中。
